package.name: eval_sdk
package.description: Domain-independent embodied-AI evaluation core (doc21): deterministic trace-id seed (the cross-lane join key), a Langfuse-tracing seam, a fail-open score sink, pure stats helpers (percentile / path length), and token-cost math. ROS- and warehouse-import-free so it is unit-testable with no SDK and no ROS build (doc16 §11). langfuse is a lazy/optional pip extra, never a rosdep key.
